message:
fix(test): skip session crash-recovery tests when chmod is ineffective

When tests run as root or in environments that bypass POSIX permission
bits, chmod 0o444/0o555 does not actually prevent writes. Detect this
at runtime by probing the restricted path after applying permissions
and early-return instead of producing false test failures. Applies to
4 session persistence test functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
